history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly ahead (north) at row 06, column D is lava (L), so moving forward is deadly. The cell to the right (east) at row 07, column E is a floor (.), which is safe. Turning right will allow me to move eastward and then north toward the goal at (5,F). There is no safe path to the left (wall) or forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead (north) at row 06, column D is a floor (.), safe to move into. The goal is at row 05, column B, up and to the left. The immediate left and right cells are lava or wall, so going forward is the best option to start heading toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
My current position is row 07, column D, facing north. The cell directly ahead (north) at row 06, column D is a floor (.), which is safe to move into. The left cell (west) is lava (L), and the right cell (east) is a wall (#). Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at row 06, column B.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column D, facing north. The goal is at row 07, column B, which is two cells to the west. The cell immediately west (column C) is a safe floor. To move toward the goal, I need to turn left (counter-clockwise) to face west.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column D, facing west. The goal is visible at row 05, column D, directly north of my position. The cell immediately north (row 06, column D) is a safe floor, and the goal is two steps north. Since I am facing west, I need to turn right to face north and move toward the goal. Moving west would lead away and expose me to lava if attempting to go north later.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column D, facing north. The goal is at row 07, column B, two cells west. The cell directly in front is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. To reach the goal, I need to turn left to face west, then move forward twice across safe floor cells.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column D, facing north. The goal is at row 05, column D, directly ahead. The cell immediately in front (row 06, column D) is a safe floor. I can move forward safely toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column D, facing north. The goal is at row 06, column D, directly ahead. The cell immediately in front is a safe floor. I can move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
